title: A 7-Year-Old Put On 50 Sweaters at Once and Beat a World Record
script: He wore HOW many sweaters?! Skyler Rozell-Whitaker is 7 years old and a second-grader at Ramsey Elementary School in Monroeville, Pennsylvania. About a year ago, he decided he wanted a Guinness World Record. On June 1, he visited the Monroeville Public Library and put on sweater after sweater — 50 total — to beat the previous record of 46. The first attempt almost didn't count because Guinness required footage of both putting the sweaters ON and taking them OFF. So Skyler went back to the library a second time, did it again, and this time got the full video. 50 sweaters. Confirmed. He now holds the Guinness World Record for most sweaters worn at once. The sweaters will be donated to a fall charity drive. Is 50 sweaters the limit, or will someone beat Skyler by the time school starts?
